nav.bio:
Hi, my name is Pedro Valdivia
Senior Full-Stack / Mobile Developer.
Welcome to my personal website!

about.title: Pedro Valdivia
about.bio: I am a software developer specialized in frontend and backend development of complex and scalable applications, always try to stay ahead with the different technologies, languages and frameworks.
about.bioClosing: There are no limits to development.
about.introBeforeResume: I have more than 8+ years of experience in creating software for different clients. Below is a quick overview of my main technical skill sets and technologies I use. Want to find out more about my experience? Check out my

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: Welcome to my online portfolio. On this page you can find some of the projects I have carried out, the languages, frameworks used, curiosities and difficulties that their development has had.

blogPage.title: A Blog About Software Development And Life
blogPage.intro: Welcome to my blog. Subscribe and get my latest blog post in your inbox.
blogPage.successText: Thank you very much for subscribing to my blog. Soon you will be notified of new publications.
